title: Iron Nuggets Craft Chainmail
description: Craft chainmail armor with iron nuggets! useful for early game.
body:
Craft chainmail armor with iron nuggets! Useful for early game. Usual recipe as any other armor, but with iron nuggets.

![chainmail recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b79d5bb92a769cd781a5ec3b934428d4349b4f8.png)

_Decided against making chainmail repairable with iron nuggets, since when you have an anvil, you can spare iron ingots to repair chainmail, or you are on iron armor._

---
